attributes.Sql Query:

 (
 select CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_LNS_AL
 minus
 select CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINES_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = STG_CG1_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_LNS_AL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_LNS_AL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINES_ALL)
